title: The Legal Services Authorities Act, 1987
full_text: The Legal Services Authorities Act, 1987 विधिक सेवा प्राधिकरण अधिनियम, 1987 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198739 Act Number: 39 Enactment Date: 1987-10-11 Act Year: 1987 Short Title: The Legal Services Authorities Act, 1987 Hindi Title: विधिक सेवा प्राधिकरण अधिनियम, 1987 Long Title: An Act to constitute legal services authorities to provide free and competent legal services to the weaker sections of the society to ensure that opportunities for securing justice are not denied to any citizen by reason of economic or other disabilities, and to organise Lok Adalats to secure that the operation of the legal system promotes justice on a basis of equal opportunity. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Department of Justice Enforcement Date: 09-11-1995 Notification: 9th November, 1995, vide notification No. S.O. 893(E), dated 9th November, 1995, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Constitution of the National Legal Services Authority. Section 3A. Supreme Court Legal Services Committee. Section 4. Functions of the Central Authority. Section 5. Central Authority to work in coordination with other agencies. Section 6. Constitution of State Legal Services Authority. Section 7. Functions of the State Authority. Section 8. State Authority to act in coordination with other agencies, etc., and be subject to directions given by the Central Authority. Section 8A. High Court Legal Services Committee. Section 9. District Legal Services Authority. Section 10. Functions of the District Authority. Section 11. District Authority to act in coordination with other agencies and be subject to directions given by the Central Authority, etc. Section 11A. Taluk Legal Services Committee. Section 11B. Functions of Taluk Legal Services Committee. Section 12. Criteria for giving legal services. Section 13. Entitlement of legal services. Section 14. Grants by the Central Government. Section 15. National Legal Aid Fund. Section 16. State Legal Aid Fund. Section 17. District Legal Aid Fund. Section 18. Accounts and audit. Section 19. Organisation of Lok Adalats. Section 20. Cognizance of cases by Lok Adalats. Section 21. Award of Lok Adalat. Section 22. Powers of Lok Adalat or Permanent Lok Adalat. Section 22A. Definitions. Section 22B. Establishment of Permanent Lok Adalats. Section 22C. Cognizance of cases by Permanent Lok Adalat. Section 22D. Procedure of Permanent Lok Adalat. Section 22E. Award of Permanent Lok Adalat to be final. Section 23. Members and staff of Authorities, Committees and Lok Adalats to be public servants. Section 24. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 25. Act to have overriding effect. Section 26. Power to remove difficulties. Section 27. Power of Central Government to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 28. Power of State Government to make rules. Section 29. Power of Central Authority to make regulations. Section 29A. Power of State Authority to make regulations. Section 30.
